lesson: The attempt avoided all dissonance and still failed: parallel fifths on every downbeat, moving on the same clock as the cantus. The correction syncopates - attacks on the half-beat sustained across each downbeat as a four-suspension chain (4ths, a tritone, resolving down by step) - and both problems vanish at once: the dissonance is spent on purpose, and the displaced attack clock decorrelates the voices. Counterpoint is noise shaping; the suspension is its unit of expenditure.
